prompt: Check the health of our n8n DigitalOcean droplet
expectations: SSH into the droplet to check disk, memory, and container status
Check n8n API health via curl localhost:5678/healthz
Check SQLite database size
Produce a structured health card with OK/WARN/CRIT status per check
Check external accessibility via HTTPS

prompt: The n8n server disk is at 92%. Fix it.
expectations: Run n8n-disk-guard.sh via SSH
Check SQLite size and run orphan cleanup + VACUUM if needed
Report before/after disk percentages
Follow guard limits (max 1 per hour, check free space before VACUUM)

prompt: n8n is returning 502, the container seems down
expectations: SSH to check docker ps status
Verify disk has >2GB free before attempting restart
Run docker compose up -d n8n
Verify health after restart with curl healthz
Not exceed 3 restart attempts per hour

prompt: Take a snapshot of the n8n droplet before we do maintenance
expectations: Use doctl or DigitalOcean API to create snapshot
Name snapshot with date prefix
Wait for snapshot completion before proceeding

prompt: Create a React component for the settings page
expectations: Should NOT trigger digitalocean-infra skill
This is a frontend development task, not infrastructure

prompt: Check the Supabase database for missing records
expectations: Should NOT trigger digitalocean-infra skill
This is a database query task, not droplet infrastructure
